characters.name: Alex
characters.description: Alexis a character from "Signing Time!". Alex wears an orange shirt. He has brown hair. He signs all the words in American Sign Language. Alex's first appearance was in "My First Signs" and the latest appearance was in "Days of the Week". He did not appear in new episodes ofSigning Time!at all.

characters.name: Crowd
characters.description: Thecrowdare characters from "Signing Time!" who appeared in "ABC Signs", "My Day", and "My Favorite Sport".

characters.name: Hopkins
characters.description: Hopkinsis a character from "Signing Time!". He appeared in all 23 episodes of "Signing Time!", except "My First Signs", "Playtime Signs", and "Everyday Signs". Hopkins is green. The frog has eyes and has legs that make them hop. Hopkins's first appearance was in "Family, Feelings, and Fun" and the latest appearance was in "Days of the Week", except "My First Signs", "Playtime Signs", and "Everyday Signs". He did not appear in new episodes ofSigning Time!at all.

characters.name: Kids
characters.description: Kidsare characters who appeared in all 26 episodes ofSigning Time!. Their first appearances was in "My First Signs" and their latest appearances was in "Days of the Week". They do not appear in new episodes ofSigning Time!at all.

characters.name: Knight
characters.description: Aknightis a person granted an honorary title of knighthood by a head of state (including the pope) or representative for service to the monarch, the church or the country, especially in a military capacity. The knight only appeared in "Once Upon a Time", which was filmed as #206.

characters.name: Leah
characters.description: Leahis a character from "Signing Time!". Leah wears a purple shirt. She has brown hair. She signs all the words in American Sign Language. Leah's first appearance was in "My First Signs" and the latest appearance was in "Days of the Week". She did not appear in new episodes ofSigning Time!at all.

characters.name: Rachel
characters.description: Rachelis a character from "Signing Time!". She is portrayed byRachel Coleman. She created 26 episodes of "Signing Time!". Rachel Coleman wears a yellow sweater and blue pants. She has brown hair. She has orange tape and blue tape on her fingers. She signs all the words in American Sign Language. Rachel Coleman's first appearance was in "My First Signs" and the latest appearance was in "Days of the Week". She does not appear in new episodes of "Signing Time!" at all.

characters.name: Signing Time! Theme Song
characters.description: Signing Time! Theme Songis a song played before every episode and album of "Signing Time!". There’s singing time and dancing timeAnd laughing time and playing timeAnd now it is our favorite time SIGNING TIME!It’s SIGNING TIME with Alex and LeahIt’s SIGNING TIME with Alex and LeahCome visit our big tree houseYou can visit everydayThere’s lots of room for everyoneAnd we can start todayIt’s SIGNING TIME with Alex and LeahIt’s SIGNING TIME with Alex and LeahIt’s SIGNING TIME with Alex and LeahCome and playWhere friends can meetAnd find we’re not so different after allSo much to share we love to playSo come on in and share our dayThere’s singing time and dancing timeAnd laughing time and playing timeAnd now it is our favorite time SIGNING TIME!It’s SIGNING TIME with Alex and LeahIt’s SIGNING TIME with Alex and LeahIt’s SIGNING TIME with Alex and LeahCome and play, come and play, come and play There’s singing time and dancing timeAnd laughing time and playing timeAnd now it is our favorite time SIGNING TIME!It’s SIGNING TIME with Alex and LeahIt’s SIGNING TIME with Alex and LeahCome and play, come and play

characters.name: Unicorn
characters.description: Aunicornis a white, magic horse with a unicorn horn growing on its forehead fromSigning Time!. The unicorn only appeared in "Once Upon a Time", which was filmed as #206.
